content:
There's something special about discovering a new neighborhood gem, and we can't wait to welcome you to our brand-new tasting room in Covington! Pull up a seat at 16783 SE 272nd St, Ste A, and pour yourself into the story behind our award-winning Washington wines. From our 2023 Reserved Malbec to our crisp 2025 Viognier, every bottle is crafted with heart right here in our home state. When you visit us, you're supporting a small local business and the people who pour their passion into every glass. Come say hello — we saved a spot just for you.

#StottleWinery #CovingtonWA #WashingtonWine #SupportSmallBusiness #TastingRoom #LocalWinery #PNWWine #WineLovers #DrinkLocal #NewInTown
topic: Stottle Winery's new tasting room in Covington. Address: 16783 SE 272nd st, ste A, Covington, WA, 98052. Support small business and drink Washington award wine
